The ODSGroup class¶

class ODSGroup(object)¶

The ODSGroup is a wrapper around the ODS class, enabling to read from multiple ODS files at a time by calling ODS methods and concatenating filters and variables which are returned.

ODSGroup(files):
Parameters:files (list) – list of ods files to read

Opens the specified files.

compile(expression, used_observations = True):

Same as ODS.compile but compiles the expression over all the open files.

extract(name,filter = None):

Same as ODS.extract but extracts the variable over all the open files. If filter is provided, it is applied to the concatenated variable.

Synonym :read
